title.en: Therefore, they are very well prepared before t...

content.en:
The peak realm god opened up the super-dimensional heart domain is almost certain death, whoever dares to cultivate the super-dimensional heart domain will only dare to cultivate the super-dimensional heart domain when he reaches the half-step super-dimensional realm!

In fact, even if you reach the Extra-Dimensional Heart Domain, if you don't have enough preparation, you don't dare to cultivate the Extra-Dimensional Heart Domain, otherwise if you fail, you will be hit hard.

Therefore, they are very well prepared before they dare to try.

The Silver Blood Realm God had never seen a peak Realm God who had opened up the extra-dimensional heart domain, and Ye Tian was the first.

"No wonder he bought the golden pith of immortality, it turned out that he really cultivated by himself!"

The Silver Blood Realm God said secretly.

He knew that it would be difficult for him to kill Ye Tian, so he prepared to leave.

However, at this moment, Ye Tian sacrificed the Hidden Heaven Disk, which instantly covered this area, making it impossible for other half-step extra-dimensional realms or even extra-dimensional realms to spy on this place for a while.

"Hidden Heaven Disk, this thing can't be used to trap me, it's just covering up this area!"

The Silver Blood Realm God was very puzzled by Ye Tian's actions, but he didn't think too much about it, but fled quickly.

But suddenly, he felt locked in, and the danger of death came to his heart.

I saw a fragment appear in Ye Tian's hand, and under the control of the small level super-dimensional power and super-dimensional control technique, this fragment killed the silver blood realm god.

"That's ......"

"Fragments of Super 847 Dimensional Soldiers!"

"How can he control the extradimensional dao soldiers!"

It is very difficult to control the extra-dimensional dao soldiers, even he does not dare to control the extra-dimensional dao soldiers, it is rumored that only a very small number of half-step super-dimensional realms use some special methods to dare to control the super-dimensional dao soldiers, and they need to pay a certain price.

However, there was no room for him to think.

Burst!

The fragments of the super-dimensional dao soldier penetrated everything, and also penetrated the defense of the super-dimensional secret treasure on his body, and even the super-dimensional power was shattered and penetrated.

His body was torn open, and a terrifying force shattered everything about him.

Gradually, his physical body was shattered, and his consciousness sank and dissipated.

And just like that, he fell, and his body floated in the void.

At this moment, Ye Tian was also uncomfortable, after all, forcibly urging the fragments of the super dimensional dao soldiers, he himself was also affected, but he didn't care.

"Killed this half-step extra-dimensional realm with one blow, the super-dimensional dao soldier is really terrifying!"

Ye Tianyi waved his hand, took away this half-step extradimensional realm item, put away the Hidden Heaven Disk, and immediately left here.

......

The death of a half-step extradimensional realm absolute (cabi) can't cause any big waves, after all, the half-step extradimensional realm is too ordinary in the territory of six thousand.

Besides, if it fell to the sake of intercepting and killing him, this half-step extradimensional realm definitely had no background.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not panic at all.

Broken City.

After Ye Tian went around in a circle, he came back and began to sort out the harvest this time.

"This half-step extradimensional realm is really poor!"

Ye Tian was speechless.

The property on the other party is really small, at most about 300 million gala blue treasure coins, which is still so much if all the items are sold.

No wonder the other party is eyeing his Immortal Golden Essence, because he spent one billion Gala Blue Treasure Coins to buy the Immortal Golden Essence, and the other party's heart is too normal.

"This silver-blooded realm god should be cooperating with a certain half-step extradimensional realm of the Garan Chamber of Commerce, otherwise it would be impossible to know my information!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Among the items of this silver-blooded god, he also discovered a method of extradimensional body transformation-blood body transformation.

This transformation method can make the physical body of the peak realm god more than ten times stronger, and can offset the effect of ninety percent of the superdimensional assimilation, and even help to comprehend the power of the superdimension.

However, the side effects of this blood body transformation method are also very large, seriously damaging the foundation, and it will inevitably be impossible to break through to the extradimensional realm in the future.

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, if the other party had really cultivated the Blood Body Transformation Method, his physical body was extremely powerful, and his combat power was naturally very strong, then it would be impossible for his Super Dimensional Dao Soldier Fragment to kill him in an instant with one blow, and even his combat power would be much stronger than him.

He is going to keep this blood body transformation method, maybe he can use it for some peak realm gods of the human race in the future.

After all, it is really difficult to comprehend the power of the superdimension, and he can't help his relatives to comprehend the power of the superdimension, let alone other races, sometimes he really can't withstand the assimilation of the superdimension, it is better to cultivate the blood body transformation method.

Of course, if you want to cultivate the blood body transformation method, you also have to capture some corresponding extra-dimensional creatures, such as the blood dragon super-dimensional creatures, which are most suitable for the blood body transformation method.

......

Extreme Yang Realm, Tianyang Family.

A group of peak realm gods came here and were resting in a dojo of the Tianyang family.

Ye Tian also came here.

At this time, many peak realm gods were discussing a matter. []

"Everyone, the Tianyang family let us enter a treasure land to find the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, we must take out ten Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass from it, before we are allowed to take away all the resources found in it, if the meat silk is not enough to make up ten Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, then we are only allowed to take away one-tenth of the resources. Why are they in such a hurry to collect the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass?"

"I know a little bit of information, it is said that there is a big problem with one of the extra-dimensional realms of the Tianyang family, and it takes the Tianchao Golden Ruin Grass to survive, and it needs a large amount of Tianchao Jinxu Grass, and the Tianyang Golden Ruin Grass is only available in a very small number of places, and the treasure land occupied by the Tianyang Family is very dangerous inside, and only the peak realm gods are allowed to enter, and the half-step superdimensional realm cannot be entered. And the number of peak realm gods of the Tianyang family is naturally not so much, and they can't bring out too much Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, and it is easy to lose a lot, so it is open to the outside world, so that the peak realm gods from the outside world can go in to find Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass. "

"I see. "

"I've heard about it too, and the treasure land we are about to go to is just a channel for the Tianyang Family to obtain the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, and it is said that the Tianyang Family is also collecting the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass in other parts of the Six Thousand Territory and even other territories. "

"This time, the Tianyang family has paid a lot, and it has definitely suffered a heavy loss. "

"There are only three extradimensional realms in the Tianyang family, and the one who has something wrong this time is the most powerful one, so they naturally have to desperately rescue it!"

......

Ye Tian had been listening to the exchange of these peak realm gods, and did not participate.

He also heard that the Tianyang family recruited a group of peak realm gods to explore a treasure land, and it is said that there are a lot of resources in that treasure land, if it is not a half-step transcendent realm that cannot enter, otherwise the half-step transcendent realm wants to enter.

He felt that entering that treasure land this time was very likely to obtain a huge amount of resources.

Moreover, the Tianyang Family will definitely not dare to play tricks in this public solicitation, after all, some peak realm gods may come from forces that are even more powerful than the Tianyang Family, where do they dare to cause trouble during this period!

So, resources can definitely be brought out.
